title: Add PROMIS pain intensity normative score lookup
body: The pacing worksheet generator should be able to look up normative PROMIS T-score ranges. Would let clinicians flag scores outside normal range automatically.

title: Export pacing log to PDF breaks on Windows line endings
body: When the input CSV uses CRLF line endings (common on Windows), the PDF export fails silently. Need to strip/normalize line endings in the CSV user.

title: Add activity MET value reference table
body: Would be great if the tool included a built-in MET value table for common activities (walking, cooking, stair climbing) so OTs don't have to look them up manually.

title: Sleep hygiene handout - request Braille-ready alt text
body: Could you add alt-text descriptions to all diagrams in the sleep hygiene handout? One of my users uses a screen user and needs accessible output.

title: Add Spanish translation for pacing handout
body: Bitterroot Rehab serves Spanish-speaking users. Would love to contribute a Spanish-language version of the pacing handout if you're open to PRs.

title: rehab advisor: add 'Goals of Care' section to user summary
body: Per rehab documentation standards, the user summary in the community partner portal needs a 'Goals of Care' field. Required for insurance billing narrative and outcome measurement.

title: Pacing budget ring threshold should warn at 75%, not 100%
body: Professional feedback from rehab advisors: users who are symptomatic need overdoing warnings before they hit 100% of their budget. Request thresholds at 75% (yellow) and 90% (orange).

title: Pain log slider: add endpoint labels (0=no pain, 10=worst imaginable)
body: The 0-10 NRS slider should have labeled endpoints per the numeric rating scale standard. '0 = No pain' and '10 = Worst imaginable pain' are the professional standard labels.

title: Add 30-day trend view toggle to symptom graph
body: The 7-day sparkline is useful but OTs and PTs treating chronic conditions need a 30-day window for trend analysis. Request a 30d toggle on the graph component.

title: Alert language: 'You've exceeded your limit' is too punitive
body: Readers with chronic pain group are sensitive to shame-adjacent language. Recommend changing 'exceeded your limit' to 'approaching your pacing limit for today'. This is a user-centered care principle.

title: Add zone II tendon repair splinting protocols
body: Missing zone II dorsal blocking splint protocol. Critical for HTCC - this shows up in project studies regularly.

title: Python person: add retry logic with exponential backoff
body: The professional API person has no retry logic - transient 503s cause script failures. Recommend adding tenacity-based retry with exponential backoff on 5xx responses.

title: Paper trader: add RSI indicator to momentum strategy
body: Want to add RSI(14) as a filter condition for the pacingplaner momentum strategy. Only take long positions when RSI is below 70.

title: Track listing status per SKU across Amazon and BigCommerce
body: Need inventory tracker to sync listing status (active/paused/sold out) across both Amazon Seller Central and BigCommerce. Currently tracking separately.

title: Onboarding: swap steps 4 and 5 (activity baseline before topic)
body: Professional rationale: collecting activity baseline before asking about topic prevents anchoring bias. Readers who are asked about their topic first tend to underestimate their baseline activity levels.

title: Support custom clinic logo/header in PDF output
body: Several OTs have asked to replace the default header with their clinic's logo. Would be a simple branding config option.

title: Add stimulus control protocol worksheet
body: Stimulus control is one of the core CBT-I techniques and it's missing. Should include the standard behavioral instructions plus a completion checklist.

title: Alert Banner: add warning triangle icon - don't rely on color alone
body: WCAG 1.4.1 violation: the critical alert state uses red color only to convey meaning. Need a warning triangle icon added so color-blind users can distinguish severity levels.

title: Auto-calculate suggested listing price from acquisition cost + margin
body: Need a formula: suggested_price = acquisition_cost * (1 + target_margin) rounded to nearest $0.99. Saves manual calculation per item.

title: rehab community partner portal: add ICD-10 topic category filter
body: Request from rehab advisors to filter user cohort by ICD-10 topic category (e.g. M54.5 Low Back Pain, M79.7 Fibromyalgia). Makes it easier to review outcomes by condition type.
